title: Remote desktop fullscreen, invite status text, and scroll wheel
description:
Remote assistance now supports a true full-screen video feed, turns Accept/Decline invites into plain chat status text after the customer responds, and scrolls the customer page when the admin uses the mouse wheel over the remote viewport.

Who is affected: PipeShare support remote desktop on BASE and SaaS.
changeLog: Full screen control for the remote video feed panel.
Accepted/declined remote invites become normal chat status text.
Mouse wheel over remote viewport scrolls the customer session.
